tasks.description: In calc.py, the add(a, b) function returns a - b instead of a + b. Fix it so the tests pass.
In seq.py, last(xs) raises IndexError because it uses xs[len(xs)] (off by one). Fix it to return the last element.
In mathx.py, double(x) computes x * 2 but never returns it (returns None). Add the missing return.
In counts.py, get_count(d, k) raises KeyError when k is absent. Make it return 0 for missing keys.
In strutil.py, reverse(s) returns the string unchanged. Make it return the reversed string.
In nums.py, evens(xs) keeps ODD numbers (x % 2 == 1). Fix it to keep even numbers.
In fact.py, factorial(0) recurses forever because the base case is `n == 1`. Fix the base case so factorial(0) == 1.
In valid.py, in_range(x, lo, hi) uses OR so it's always true. Fix it to require x within [lo, hi].
In helper.py, slugify replaces spaces with '' instead of '-', so make_slug in api.py is wrong. Fix slugify.
In acc.py, Accumulator.add overwrites total (self.total = x) instead of accumulating. Fix it to add.
In math_utils.py, square(x) returns x + x instead of x * x, so sum_of_squares in stats.py is wrong. Fix square.
In running.py, running_max initializes m = 0, so it returns 0 for all-negative inputs. Fix the initialization to handle negatives.
In avg.py, average(xs) raises ZeroDivisionError on an empty list. Make it return 0 for empty input.
In ops.py, one of the four functions is wrong: mul(a, b) returns a + b instead of a * b. Fix it.
